name: doc-coauthoring
tagline: Guides a three-stage workflow (context gathering, section-by-section drafting, reader testing) for co-authoring docs, specs, and proposals.
verdict: Solid, safe workflow skill: clear trigger phrasing, concrete step-by-step procedure, defined output contract (artifact or named .md file), determinism via stated defaults for every fork, and graceful degradation when artifacts/sub-agents/integrations are unavailable. No security concerns found. Weak spots: no stated exclusions for when NOT to offer this.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope guidance anywhere; a broad doc-workflow trigger with no exclusions risks misfiring on trivial writing asks.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
